steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank verb is behavioral economists such as Gino — a plural noun phrase.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires that a verb match its subject in number.

Since behavioral economists is plural, the verb must be in plural form. Contend is the plural present tense form and works.

The other options — is contending, has contended, and contends — are all singular forms that violate the agreement rule.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
